nasb.text: But Peter said, “Man, I do not know what you are talking about.” Immediately, while he was still speaking, a rooster crowed.

esv.text: But Peter said, “Man, I do not know what you are talking about.” And immediately, while he was still speaking, the rooster crowed.

cnv.text: 彼得說：“你這個人，我不知道你說的是甚麼！”他還在說話的時候，雞就叫了。

ccb.text: 彼得说：“你这人，我不知道你在说什么！”话才出口，鸡就叫了。

csbs.text: 彼得说：“你这个人哪，我不知道你在说什么！”他正说着的时候，鸡立时就叫了。
